Bash(/c/Python314/python -c "
import re, os, glob

os.chdir\('C:/Users/scott/lmrf-scrape/site'\)

html_files = glob.glob\('*.html'\) + glob.glob\('blog/*.html'\)
image_refs = set\(\)

for f in html_files:
    with open\(f, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
        content = fh.read\(\)
    matches = re.findall\(r'\(?:images/|\\.\\.\\/images/\)\([^\\x27\\"\\\)\\s]+\)', content\)
    for m in matches:
        image_refs.add\(m\)

disk_files = set\(\)
for f in os.listdir\('images'\):
    if os.path.isfile\(os.path.join\('images', f\)\):
        disk_files.add\(f\)

print\('=== REFERENCED IMAGE FILENAMES \(%d\) ===' % len\(image_refs\)\)
for r in sorted\(image_refs\):
    print\('  ', r\)

print\(\)
print\('=== FILES ON DISK \(%d\) ===' % len\(disk_files\)\)

print\(\)
referenced_but_missing = image_refs - disk_files
print\('=== REFERENCED IN HTML BUT MISSING ON DISK \(%d\) ===' % len\(referenced_but_missing\)\)
for m in sorted\(referenced_but_missing\):
    print\('  MISSING:', m\)

print\(\)
on_disk_not_referenced = disk_files - image_refs
print\('=== ON DISK BUT NOT REFERENCED IN ANY HTML \(%d\) ===' % len\(on_disk_not_referenced\)\)
for m in sorted\(on_disk_not_referenced\):
    print\('  UNUSED:', m\)
")
